client_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) application (client) ID for the OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Microsoft Entra ID application client secret. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Microsoft Graph OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: Microsoft Graph API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Microsoft identity platform token endpoint override. When unset, it is derived from tenant_id (https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant_id}/oauth2/v2.0/token, tenant_id defaulting to "common"). MUST be an https URL with a host; the hook fails closed on an invalid value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

tenant_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID (or "common"/"organizations"/"consumers"), used to derive token_url when token_url is not set directly.

scope.description: OAuth 2.0 scope(s) requested in the token exchange (space-separated). Optional; omitted from the token request entirely when unset.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
